inputs.client_context: Client: Pinnacle Logistics, a mid-size freight forwarding company with 85 employees in Amman, Jordan. Challenge: manual quote generation taking 4 hours per quote with 23 percent error rate, losing deals to faster competitors. Solution: deployed AI-powered quote automation system integrated with their ERP. Results: quote generation reduced to 12 minutes (97 percent faster), error rate dropped to 1.4 percent, win rate improved from 18 to 31 percent, $420,000 additional revenue in first 6 months.
